---
title: "OrgPath in NAC / 802.1X & Cert-Based Network Admission"
subtitle: "Canonical Spec · UIAO_012"
date: 2026-05-15
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Canonical UIAO Specification

**UIAO_012** — status: **Draft** — version: **0.1**

This page renders the canonical UIAO_012 source verbatim. The
authoritative source is at
[`src/uiao/canon/UIAO_012_OrgPath_in_NAC_and_8021X.md`](../../src/uiao/canon/UIAO_012_OrgPath_in_NAC_and_8021X.md).
Per [ADR-072](../adr/adr-072-canon-publication-policy.qmd), this
canonical page is generated as an `include`-style wrapper.
:::

{{< include ../../src/uiao/canon/UIAO_012_OrgPath_in_NAC_and_8021X.md >}}
